def find_first_match(items, target):
    for index, item in enumerate(items):
        if item == target:
            return index
    return -1

def process_until_sentinel(data_stream):
    results = []
    for item in data_stream:
        if item is None:
            break
        results.append(transform(item))
    return results

def transform(item):
    return item * 2
